data.title: As a Java developer, architect-foundation scaffolds a Checkstyle configuration and Spotless pom.xml enforcer setup
data.description:
## Description

**What**: [STRETCH — not required for epic closure] Update architect-foundation's Phase 3 Enforcer Setup to scaffold a checkstyle.xml using Google Java Style and add maven-checkstyle-plugin v3.3.1 and spotless-maven-plugin v2.43.0 to pom.xml with executions bound to the validate phase. After scaffolding, mvn validate must pass.

**Scope**:
- IN: checkstyle.xml at project root using Google Java Style ruleset; pom.xml additions: maven-checkstyle-plugin v3.3.1 (execution: verify phase, check goal) and spotless-maven-plugin v2.43.0 (execution: validate phase, check goal); architect-foundation Phase 3 Enforcer Setup section updated; mvn validate passes after scaffolding
- OUT: Gradle equivalent (not in scope for this story); stretch — not sprint-blocking

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, architect-foundation Phase 3 Enforcer Setup scaffolds a checkstyle.xml at the project root using Google Java Style
  ← Satisfies: "[STRETCH] architect-foundation Phase 3 Enforcer Setup: checkstyle.xml using Google Java Style"
- When this story is complete, the scaffolded pom.xml includes maven-checkstyle-plugin v3.3.1 and spotless-maven-plugin v2.43.0 with correct phase bindings; mvn validate exits 0
  ← Satisfies: "maven-checkstyle-plugin v3.3.1 + spotless-maven-plugin v2.43.0 in pom.xml with executions bound to validate phase; mvn validate passes after scaffolding"

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Pinned versions (v3.3.1 and v2.43.0) are specified in the epic spec; do not upgrade without explicit approval
- [Scope] This is STRETCH — skip if sprint capacity is constrained; epic closure does not require this story

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
